request: Explain why the assistant failed to auto commit/push review task records and whether the guide is insufficient or script enforcement is needed.
request_original: 내말은 왜 너가 깃 실수를 한거야? 가이드 문서가 부실해? 스크립트로 별도로 강제해야하나?
tier_rationale: Explanation and process analysis only; no harness behavior change requested yet.

include: Root cause analysis of the missed commit/push
Assessment of whether documentation or automation should be improved
exclude: Changing guide documents or scripts in this task unless the user explicitly requests implementation

success_criteria: Clearly identify the immediate cause of the git workflow mistake.
Identify whether the current guides already cover the expected behavior.
Recommend whether documentation updates, script enforcement, or both are appropriate.

positive: Be candid about the process failure.
negative: Do not modify harness behavior in this explanatory task.
Do not overwrite historical ledger events.
